decision_needed: GitHub Issue #68 を FDA artifact 形式の正式 Epic として管理するか。
trigger: Human requested formal FDA artifact creation so PR granularity is fixed by the artifact.

context.current_state: Issue #68 exists as a GitHub EPIC, but it was not yet represented as FDA delivery artifacts.
context.relevant_requirement: Create formal FDA artifacts and use them to determine PR granularity.

options.description: Keep #68 only as a GitHub issue EPIC.
cons: Case / Claim / Proof mapping is not available to FDA tooling

options.description: Create FDA artifact set for #68 and make planned_prs.json the PR granularity source.
pros: PR sequence, scope, proof, and acceptance criteria become explicit
ATO/FDA/Forge traces can refer to stable artifact IDs
cons: Artifacts must be kept in sync with implementation PRs

decisions.summary: Formalize Issue #68 as FDA delivery artifacts.

options.description: Keep #68 only as a GitHub issue EPIC.
Create FDA artifact set and use planned_prs.json as PR granularity source.

impact.scope: Adds planning artifacts without changing runtime code.
impact.security: No secret or live execution surface is added.
impact.schedule: Adds a small planning step before implementation PRs.
impact.ux: Improves reviewer and maintainer visibility into PR sequence.
impact.operations: Creates stable artifact paths for ATO/FDA/Forge evidence.

default_if_no_decision: Do not create FDA artifacts and keep #68 as a GitHub issue only.

recorded_decision.rationale: Human requested formal FDA artifact creation so PR granularity can be determined from artifacts.
